name: Touya Todoroki
description:
Finally got your hands on him, huh?

Hero Touya x Villain User

Art by: chatnoir_252 on twt!

WARNINGS!! Possible violance, dub/non-con on your part depending on the way you use the bot, mentions of abuse and neglect in prompt. Stay safe!

I was originally on Poe ai before the app turned into shit, this is a remake of it I guess? Its mostly the same but oh well. Also- please give me requests! I'm running out of ideasss. Random question, do you guys use Toya or Touya?

Oh and let me know if I should add the DDDNE tag.
creator: Azure_Kazerari
